codeql_results.message: XML parsing depends on a [user-provided value](1) without guarding against uncontrolled entity expansion.

findings.novelty_reason: Common XXE pattern in XML parsing
findings.description: The application parses user-supplied XML data without proper sanitization or validation against uncontrolled entity expansion.
findings.remediation_code: Use a secure XML parser that disables external entity resolution, or sanitize the input XML to remove potentially harmful entities.
findings.remediation_description: Implement robust input validation and sanitization techniques to prevent XXE attacks.

report.recommendation: Review and implement secure XML parsing practices to mitigate the risk of XXE vulnerabilities.
